title: 3BR | Vastu | Big Plot | Motivated Seller
description:

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is listed in Emirates Hills, Dubai's premier ultra-luxury villa community. However, a 3-bedroom configuration with a 3,063 sqft built-up area (BUA) is highly anomalous for this enclave, which typically features bespoke 5-to-10-bedroom mansions. The 'Big Plot' of 7,320 sqft relative to the BUA suggests significant expansion potential, and Vastu compliance appeals strongly to a high-net-worth South Asian demographic. However, the property's specifications align much more closely with neighboring communities like The Meadows or The Springs rather than genuine Emirates Hills estates.
risk_flags: Potential Location Misrepresentation: Emirates Hills rarely contains 3BR villas of this size; the property may actually be located in the adjacent Meadows or Springs communities and mislabeled to attract premium buyers.

Severe Data Discrepancy: The metadata lists 7,320 sqft (likely the plot size), while the description specifies 3,063 sqft (likely the BUA). This discrepancy artificially deflates the calculated price per sqft.

Suspicious Pricing: At AED 1,120 per sqft compared to the market median of AED 2,460, the property is priced at a 54% discount. This indicates either a highly distressed seller, major structural defects, or a bait-and-switch listing.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this property presents an incredibly high-yield flipping or redevelopment opportunity, trading at a massive 54% discount to the Emirates Hills median. However, as an analyst, the extreme discrepancies in size, atypical bedroom count for the area, and suspiciously low price per sqft serve as major red flags. Investors must verify the exact title deed location and physical condition. title: 3 bedroom I Study Type 3E in Springs
description: PRE Dubai is pleased to offer you this 3 bedroom plus Study room villa available for sale in Springs 1.<b

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a Type 3E (3-bedroom + study) end-unit villa located in Springs 1, an established and highly sought-after gated community within the Emirates Living master development. While the listing categorizes the area under the 'Emirates Hills' master community (which skews the market median upward to AED 2,460/sqft due to ultra-luxury mansions), The Springs is actually a mid-to-high-end family community where typical rates range from AED 1,400 to 1,800/sqft. Furthermore, the listed size of 3,695 sqft likely represents the plot size rather than the standard Built-Up Area (BUA) of approximately 2,246 sqft for a standard Type 3E layout.
risk_flags: Area Misclassification: Categorized under 'Emirates Hills' instead of 'The Springs', artificially making the property look like a massive bargain compared to the AED 2,460/sqft median.

Size Discrepancy: The 3,695 sqft figure is almost certainly the plot size. If the BUA is the standard 2,246 sqft, the actual price per BUA sqft is approximately AED 2,570/sqft, representing a significant premium.

Property Age and Maintenance: The Springs is an older community (completed mid-2000s). Buyers must budget for potential MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) issues, cosmetic renovations, or structural wear if the villa has not been recently upgraded.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied total price of approximately AED 5.77M (based on 3,695 sqft at AED 1,563/sqft), this property is priced at the premium end of the market for a Springs Type 3E. While Springs 1 offers excellent community amenities, high occupancy rates, and strong rental yields (typically 5-6% net), this specific listing is not the underpriced deal it appears to be when compared to the 'Emirates Hills' benchmark. Investors should verify the actual Built-Up Area (BUA) and renovation status before proceeding, as the true price per BUA sqft is likely well above the community average.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The Signature (DAMAC Maison Mall Street) is a high-end serviced hotel-apartment development. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

title: DEC Tower 2 | 6.75% Net ROI | Marina Views
description:
Betterhomes is proud to present this well maintained one bedroom apartment in the iconic DEC Tower 2, ideally situated in the heart of Dubai Marina.
Property Details

Size: 823 sq ft
Asking Price: AED 1,050,000
Current Rent: AED 80,000 per annum
Service Charges: AED 11 per sq ft (AED 9,053 per annum)
Gross ROI: 7.6%
Net ROI: 6.75%

About the Property
This spacious and bright apartment offers a functional layout with generous living space, a well-appointed kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with ample storage. The unit enjoys beautiful views and is currently tenanted, making it an ideal ready investment for discerning buyers.
About DEC Tower 2
DEC Tower 2 is a well-established residential development in Dubai Marina, one of the most sought-after waterfront communities in Dubai. Residents enjoy direct access to the Marina Walk, an array of dining and retail options, and seamless connectivity to the rest of the city via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.
Key Highlights

Prime Dubai Marina location
Currently tenanted at AED 80,000 per annum
Gross ROI of 7.6% and Net ROI of 6.75%
Strong rental demand in the area
Access to world-class amenities
Easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Metro

Contact us at Betterhomes for any inquiries and to arrange viewings.

ai_analysis.quality_context: DEC Tower 2 is an established, mid-tier residential development completed in 2009. While it lacks the premium finishes and luxury status of high-end Emaar or Select Group developments in Dubai Marina, it offers highly functional layouts and a strategic location near the southern end of the Marina, close to the metro and JBR. The property's price per sqft of AED 1,276 is a massive 32.3% discount compared to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 1,884, reflecting its older age and secondary-grade classification.
risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Completed in 2009, the building may face higher wear-and-tear, potentially leading to rising maintenance costs or future special levies for capital improvements.
Lower Capital Appreciation Potential: Mid-to-low tier buildings in Dubai Marina historically experience slower capital growth compared to premium, modern waterfront developments.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: The unit is currently tenanted at AED 80,000. Increasing the rent to current market rates will be restricted by the RERA rental index, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Secondary Location: Situated at the far end of Dubai Marina, which, while highly accessible, is generally considered less premium than the central Marina or Marina Phase 1 areas.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional high-yield, entry-level investment opportunity in Dubai Marina. With a net ROI of 6.75% (well above the Marina average of 5-5.5%) and a low service charge of AED 11/sqft, it is highly optimized for cash flow. The significant discount to the market median price per sqft provides a strong safety margin. It is highly recommended for yield-focused investors seeking stable, immediate rental income rather than aggressive capital appreciation.

title: Hot Deal Marina Heights | High ROI | 2 Parking
description:
Betterhomes is proud to present this outstanding investment opportunity in the heart of Dubai Marina, located in the well-established Marina Heights.

This unit stands out as one of the best-priced properties currently available in the building, making it a rare find for investors seeking immediate returns and long-term value appreciation.

The property is tenanted, ensuring instant rental income from day one, and offers a strong ROI, making it an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.

What truly sets this unit apart is the inclusion of two dedicated parking spaces — a highly sought-after feature in Dubai Marina that significantly enhances both rental demand and resale value.

Property Features:

* Tenanted unit – immediate income
* The lowest-priced units in the market
* Two allocated parking spaces
* Spacious layout with excellent potential
* Located in a prime marina community

Residents of Marina Heights enjoy access to a range of amenities.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Marina Heights is an established, mid-tier residential tower completed in 2006, located in the high-demand northern district of Dubai Marina. At 1,287 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a highly generous layout compared to modern, more compact layouts. Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. This pricing gap is primarily driven by the building's age and older aesthetic, but it represents an excellent entry point for value-seeking investors. The inclusion of two allocated parking spaces is a highly lucrative differentiator, as most 2-bedroom units in this micro-market only allocate one.
risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: Being sold 'tenanted' guarantees immediate cash flow, but the current rent is likely locked below current market rates due to RERA rental index restrictions, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Slower Capital Appreciation: Older towers in Dubai Marina typically experience slower capital growth compared to newer, premium waterfront developments in the same area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. This is a highly recommended buy for income-focused investors looking to secure stable, above-average ROI in a prime, high-occupancy location, with the long-term option to renovate and flip for capital gains upon tenant exit.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Altura 1, Waada within the rapidly expanding Dubai South district, this 401 sqft studio represents a highly competitive entry point. risk_flags: The significant discount to the market median (AED 1,294 vs. AED 1,875) may indicate a less premium sub-developer, a less desirable unit view/floor, or an urgent liquidation by the seller.
Resale transaction complexity, requiring strict verification that the original buyer has cleared all due milestone payments with the developer before transfer.
Potential handover delays, which are common in newly developing master communities like Dubai South.
Initial rental yields may face downward pressure until surrounding infrastructure and community amenities in the Waada sub-locality are fully completed.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This resale studio is an opportunistic buy for value-driven investors. Priced well below the market median at AED 1,294/sqft and paired with a highly desirable 2-year post-handover payment plan, it offers strong potential for capital appreciation as Dubai South matures. The low absolute ticket size (approximately AED 519,000) combined with flexible payment terms makes it an excellent asset for high-leverage yield generation or mid-term capital gains, provided developer credentials and payment histories are thoroughly vetted.

The listing is categorized under 'New Ras Al Khor Community' rather than the premium 'Dubai Creek Harbour' master community, which may affect search visibility and premium tenant targeting.

The stated market median of AED 2,500/sqft is highly elevated for the Creek Beach sub-market (where averages typically range from AED 1,800 to AED 2,200/sqft), potentially exaggerating the discount margin.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a highly attractive 'BUY' opportunity, particularly for mid-to-long-term capital appreciation and premium short-term rental yields. Acquiring a brand-new, furnished Emaar property at AED 1,631 per sqft offers an immediate safety margin. Investors should conduct a physical viewing to verify the indoor-to-outdoor square footage split, as a massive terrace could dilute the indoor price-per-sqft value, though the overall entry point remains highly competitive for the Dubai Creek Harbour area.

description:
Arabian Acres Real Estate is proud to offer this 2 Bedroom Apartment for sale in Discovery Garden, Jabal Ali First. 

Property Highlights:
-Size:  1587 sq ft

-Developed by Nakheel Properties
-Garden-themed residential clusters
-One of Dubai best places for walking

-A family-friendly and affordable neighbourhood
-In proximity to Ibn Battuta Mall
-Quick access to the main roads in the city
-Home to Discovery Gardens Metro Station on Route 2020

Building Amenities:
-Fully equipped gym
-Adult and children’s swimming pools
-Manicured gardens with walking trails
-Children’s play area
-24/7 security and concierge services
-High-speed elevators
-Easy access to metro and bus routes
-Location Benefits

Discovery Gardens is a perfect community for singles and families looking for an affordable, green, and pedestrian-friendly neighborhood in Dubai.
Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)

At Arabian Acres Real Estate, our team is dedicated to delivering a positive experience for our clients, ensuring they value their past interactions, receive the support they need, and are set up for a successful future..

description:
DOM9 Properties is pleased to present this beautifully appointed 1-bedroom apartment in Park Towers B, DIFC, offering a compelling opportunity for both end users and savvy investors seeking long-term value in Dubai’s most prestigious financial district.

Spanning 881 sq. ft., this well-proportioned residence features a generous open-plan layout designed to maximize space, functionality, and natural light. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame attractive skyline views, creating a bright and inviting living environment ideal for modern urban living. The apartment is complemented by a fully fitted kitchen with appliances, built-in wardrobes, and high-quality finishes throughout, all maintained in excellent condition.

Located in the heart of DIFC — the leading financial center of Dubai and a globally recognized business hub — this property benefits from consistent demand driven by multinational corporations, financial institutions, and senior executives. DIFC’s recent major expansion announcement further reinforces its position as a global economic powerhouse, unlocking new commercial, residential, and lifestyle developments that are expected to drive strong capital appreciation and rental growth in the surrounding area.

This apartment presents an outstanding investment opportunity, suitable for short-term leasing, long-term rentals, or owner occupation with excellent future resale potential. Proximity to Gate Avenue, Downtown Dubai, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and major transport links ensures sustained tenant demand and liquidity.

Whether you are looking to secure a high-performing DIFC asset, diversify your property portfolio, or acquire a premium city home in a blue-chip location, this Park Towers residence offers the perfect balance of lifestyle, yield, and future value.

Contact DOM9 Properties today to arrange a private viewing.

description:
Living in this DIFC apartment feels like being at the heart of a dynamic, upscale urban environment. It's a space that effortlessly marries modern design with practical comfort, perfect for someone who values both style and convenience. The open layout of this 1109 sqft unit invites an air of freedom, making it an ideal canvas for personal expression. The apartment's layout is thoughtfully designed, featuring one bedroom and two bathrooms that create a balanced flow throughout the space. Central air conditioning ensures a comfortable climate year-round, while built-in wardrobes offer smart storage solutions. Though unfurnished, the space is primed for you to bring in your own touches, turning it into a reflection of your unique style. Residents here enjoy access to an array of top-tier amenities including a shared pool and spa, a modern gym, and a secure lobby attended by a concierge. For families or those who love company, there’s a children's play area and even a children’s pool, making it a pet-friendly and family-oriented community. The building also offers stunning views of notable landmarks, adding a touch of grandeur to everyday life. Located in DIFC, this residence places you in one of the city's most prestigious and luxurious communities. The area is a hub for professionals in the financial sector, surrounded by world-class art galleries, fine dining, and high-end shopping. Nearby, you'll find esteemed schools and several healthcare facilities, ensuring that all your essential needs are met without leaving the neighborhood. Priced at 2,400,000 AED, this is more than just a home—it's an investment in a lifestyle that combines luxury, convenience, and exclusivity. description:
This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom apartment in the highly sought-after Goldcrest Views 1 is now vacant and ready to move in immediately. Perfectly positioned in the heart of Jumeirah Lakes Towers, this home offers a fantastic balance of comfort, functionality, and modern living.

•	Vacant Now

The apartment features two generous en-suite bedrooms, both with direct access to balconies, allowing you to enjoy beautiful views and fresh air from every room. A dedicated maid’s room adds excellent practicality for family or professional living. The thoughtfully designed open kitchen flows seamlessly into the living and dining area, creating a bright and sociable space ideal for entertaining or everyday family life. The entire layout is Vastu compliant, promoting positive energy and harmony throughout the home.

With balconies accessible from all rooms, you’ll love the sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. Goldcrest Views 1 offers residents premium facilities and a prime location with easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road, metro stations, lakeside promenades, and an abundance of restaurants, supermarkets, and amenities.

This is a rare opportunity to own a well-planned, move-in ready home in one of JLT’s most popular towers.

raw_area: Damac Bay Tower B, Damac Bay, Dubai Harbour, Dubai
description:
Premium one-bedroom waterfront apartment for sale in DAMAC Bay Tower B by Cavalli, located at EMAAR Beachfront. The home features luxury interiors designed by Roberto Cavalli and is marketed below the original price level as stated. Handover is expected in Q2 2027 and the unit is offered on a payment plan.

The apartment includes a huge private balcony accessible from both the bedroom and the living room, creating a strong indoor-to-outdoor lifestyle feel. Floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows enhance natural light and the open sea atmosphere. The kitchen is equipped, and the layout includes one en-suite bathroom plus a separate powder room for guest convenience.

DAMAC Bay by Cavalli is designed as a resort-style beachfront address with private beach access, three infinity pools, a water fountain feature, a rooftop opera pavilion, and the Cavalli Lounge, creating a hotel-like leisure routine with a strong branded identity.

The development leans into a maritime luxury theme, combining wave-inspired architecture with nautical interiors by Cavalli. The tower concept is positioned around sea-view living and a dramatic skyline presence at EMAAR Beachfront.

Interested in this property?
Contract Yuriy Pavlikhin today for the full payment plan breakdown, updated availability, and to arrange a private presentation.

raw_area: Central Park Residential Tower, Central Park Tower, DIFC, Dubai
description: Experience the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this elegantly designed 1 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment located in the Central Park Residential Tower. This unfurnished, 1274 sq ft unit offers a contemporary living space ideal for singles or couples looking to enjoy modern city living. Situated in a prime area, this completed residential building provides an array of amenities to enhance your lifestyle. Central air conditioning ensures equal cooling throughout, while the pet-friendly environment allows you to bring your furry friends along. Enjoy a refreshing swim in the large shared pool designed for entertainment and relaxation, or stay fit in the shared gym equipped with the latest equipment. A welcoming hall for receiving guests greets you in the building, offering an elegant first impression. The unit boasts a stunning view of the city's famous landmarks, providing a serene and picturesque backdrop to your daily life. Safety and security are paramount with 24/7 concierge service and dedicated security ensuring your peace of mind. The location is perfect, with a dedicated play area for children featuring safe equipment, making it an ideal choice for families. The central A/C system ensures equal cooling throughout the unit, while the children’s pool offers a shallow, fun water area specifically designed for little ones. This property is close to essential facilities, including Salma Al-Ansariah School, Anatomy Physical Medicine And Rehabilitation Center, and Bay Avenue Mosque, ensuring that everything you need is just a short distance away. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a slice of modern, comfortable living in the heart of Dubai.

title: LUXURY 3BR + MAID | LARGE LAYOUT | WATER LIVING
description:
Step into elevated waterfront living with this expansive 3-bedroom + maid’s apartment at Maravéa Residences by Enzo, ideally located in Dubai Islands—one of Dubai’s most promising coastal destinations. Designed as a boutique development with only 63 residences, this project offers exclusivity, privacy, and a refined island lifestyle 

Spanning approximately 2,033  this residence offers a generous and well-balanced layout, ideal for families and discerning buyers. The spacious living and dining area is designed with open-plan elegance, seamlessly connecting to large wraparound balconies.

The apartment features three well-proportioned bedrooms, including a master suite with walk-in wardrobe and en-suite bathroom, ensuring both comfort and privacy. A separate maid’s room adds practicality, while multiple bathrooms and a dedicated laundry area enhance functionality for everyday living.

The contemporary kitchen is fully fitted with high-quality finishes and integrated cabinetry, designed to complement the modern aesthetic of the home. Large windows throughout the residence allow natural light to flow in, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere 

Residents benefit from a curated selection of amenities across multiple levels, including an infinity pool, rooftop lounges, gym, yoga and meditation zones, cinema, co-working spaces, BBQ areas, landscaped gardens, and more 

Strategically located, the project offers seamless connectivity—just minutes from Dubai Islands Beach and Mall, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport and DIFC, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai 

Property Details:

• 3 Bedrooms + Maid’s Room
• Total Area: approx. 2,033 
• Large Wraparound Balconies
• Open-plan Living & Dining
• Premium Finishes & Modern Kitchen

Price: AED 5,651,000

Payment Plan: 50/50

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

Price: AED 2,000,000

Payment Plan:
10% down payment + 4% DLD
10% after 1 month

50% on completion

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond rises as Dubai Maritime City’s newest architectural landmark—two sculptural towers shaped by the sea, designed with precision, and infused with tranquility. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, Soulever reflects Dubai’s maritime heritage through fluid forms, warm natural textures, and panoramic views of the Forest, the Cove, and the vibrant city skyline.

This 1-bedroom residence spans 855  offering a refined and efficient layout that blends living, dining, and balcony spaces with effortless flow. Floor-to-ceiling windows draw in natural light, opening your home to serene Forest and Cove views. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, a stylish powder room, and elevated ceiling heights create a sense of openness and calm—perfect for modern urban living.

Residents enjoy a suite of world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a cutting-edge fitness center, yoga and wellness studios, spa facilities, a private library, residents lounge, event and co-working spaces, a dedicated kids’ area, and a lush landscaped podium with cafés and boutique retail.

Just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the ideal blend of waterfront serenity and city convenience—an exceptional lifestyle destination and a prime investment opportunity.

Price: AED 2,800,000
Size: 855 
View: Forest / Cove
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 1-bedroom residence or exploring other units in Soulever? Reach out today for exclusive availability and investment insights in Dubai Maritime City.

title: EXCLUSIVE WATERFRONT LIVING | PRIME LOCATION
raw_area: Hado by Beyond Tower B, Hado by Beyond, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Introducing this exceptional 3-bedroom residence at HADO by Beyond, offering a rare chance to own a spacious, sea-facing family home within one of Dubai Islands’ most design-forward waterfront communities.

Spanning an impressive 2318 sqft, this beautifully planned apartment delivers a harmonious balance of scale, comfort, and refined living. The residence features expansive living and dining areas complemented by floor-to-ceiling glazing, allowing uninterrupted sea and villa community views to flood the home with natural light. Each bedroom is generously proportioned to ensure privacy and comfort, while the master suite enjoys a tranquil outlook paired with premium finishes. A dedicated maid’s room and powder room enhance everyday practicality, making the home ideally suited for end users and long-term residents.

Inspired by Japanese minimalism, HADO residences are thoughtfully designed around balance, serenity, and timeless sophistication. Natural materials, soft neutral palettes, and clean architectural lines come together to create an atmosphere of understated luxury that is both contemporary and enduring.

Residents benefit from a comprehensive collection of resort-style amenities, including landscaped zen gardens, swimming pools, wellness spa, yoga studio, state-of-the-art fitness facilities, children’s play areas, social lounges, and curated retail offerings, all surrounded by lush greenery and located just moments from the beach.

The development features a highly attractive 50/50 payment plan:

10% on booking

10% one month from booking

30% during construction

50% on completion

With completion anticipated in Q3 2029, this structure offers flexible cash flow and strong long-term value for both investors and owner-occupiers.


Price: AED 7,781,000
Size: 2318 sqft
View: Sea & Villa Community

Limited availability. Contact now to secure one of the best-priced 3-bedroom residences in this landmark waterfront development.

raw_area: Treppan Serenique Residences, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Experience refined coastal living in this exquisite 3-bedroom residence at Treppan Serenique, located in the exclusive Marina District of Dubai Islands. Designed for those who appreciate space, privacy, and uninterrupted sea views, this elegant apartment combines modern luxury with the tranquility of island life.

Offering a total area of 1,831.54 , the layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, beautifully connected to a sleek kitchen with high-end finishes and integrated appliances. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the space with natural light and open onto three private balconies, each offering different vantage points of the surrounding sea, resort-style landscapes, and the peaceful island horizon.

All three bedrooms are generously sized and fitted with built-in wardrobes, with the master suite enjoying access to a dedicated balcony and spa-inspired ensuite. A separate powder room, a maid’s room, and a dedicated store room add exceptional functionality to the home.

As a resident of Treppan Serenique, you’ll enjoy:

 Infinity-edge pool overlooking the sea Wellness center and fitness studio Private beach access Concierge, valet, and 24/7 security Kids’ play areas and lush landscaped gardens 
Perfectly positioned near world-class hotels, dining, and the upcoming Wynn Casino, this address blends serene waterfront living with urban convenience.

Price: AED 6,253,000
Interested in this residence or want to explore other premium options? Get in touch today to learn more about life at Treppan Serenique, Dubai Islands.

title: Stunning Beachfront Apartment on Palm Jumeirah
raw_area: Orla by Omniyat, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
This spectacular four bedroom apartment is positioned within the highly prestigious Orla by Omniyat — managed by Dorchester Collection — on the Palm’s Crescent.

Crafted by Foster + Partners with a vision to establish a strong and seamless connection between the indoors and outdoors, it spans 8,010 sq.ft. and presents exceptionally tasteful interiors.

The living area comes as the apartment’s social and entertainment core. Double-height ceilings enhance the sense of scale and light, with the full-height glazing framing framing views of the Palm and the Arabian sea. Just outside, a vast balcony offers the perfect al fresco space with unbeatable vistas and the comfort of a private swimming pool.

Sleek and well-appointed with top-tier European appliances, the show kitchen is supported by a closed preparation kitchen — making for an elaborate culinary setup. Each bedroom is ensuite, and served by generous balconies.

The home also benefits from a maid’s room, an office, and four parking spaces, alongside Orla’s world-class facilities. Stationed minutes from Atlantis the Palm and Atlantis The Royal, its setting places prime lifestyle, entertainment and dining destinations at the doorstep.

Palm Jumeirah stands as an iconic address worldwide. Well connected to Dubai’s key thoroughfares, it places coveted destinations including The View at The Palm, Palm West Beach, Club Vista Mare, and Palm Jumeirah Mall at a convenient distance.

Reach out to us to know more about this exquisite home.

title: LOWEST PRICE UNIT | WATERFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

Price: AED 5,311,000
Size: 1469 sqft 
View: Ocean Cove 
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 2-bedroom or want to explore other Soulever residences? Get in touch today to discover exclusive investment opportunities in Dubai Maritime City.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities. 

Property Features:
- Spacious Balcony
- Fully fitted Kitchen
- Laundry Room & Storage Space
- Allotted Covered Parking Space
- 24 hours Concierge
- Infinity pools & Hi-Tech Gymnasium
- Basketball Court & Paddle Court
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing.

Burj Daman boasts hotel worthy amenities, with a stunning outdoor swimming pool, squash court and top of the range gymnasium. The complex is connected to the Daman office tower and the superb Waldorf Astoria hotel.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Edifice Brokerage is a full-service Dubai-based real estate company that prides itself on its integrity when matching people.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.

title: Incredible Renovation | Full Sea View | Great Buy
raw_area: Atlantis The Royal Residences, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.    
      
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.

description:
An exclusive portfolio of 21 fully managed co-living units in one of Dubai's fastest-growing rental communities — available as a complete acquisition or in tranches.
Each unit carries a developer-backed guaranteed income for 3 years, paid monthly by bank transfer. No tenants, no management, no additional costs.

Average guaranteed ROI: 8.95%
Total annual income: AED 1,819,800
Monthly income: AED 151,650
Units: 21 across 3 product types
